meaning: n.腰窝,侧面,军队侧翼,侧腹,胁,腰窝肉vt.在...的侧面,侧翼包围,守侧面vi.侧面与...相接
examples: They continued along the flank of the mountain.
He put his hand on the dog's flank.
The assault element, led by Captain Ramirez, opened up from their right flank.
Some of the cuts, or tranches, are high-priced tenderloin, others are just flank steak.
Hendre Fourie, who impressed on the flank in Moody's absence against Samoa, is among the replacements.
